meaning: adj.阴沉的,凄凉的,暗的vt.使人消沉n.低落的情绪,沼泽
examples: The Dismal Scientist, a webzine dedicated to economic news, is fun.
The main part of the hospital is pretty dismal but the children's ward is really lively.
Those were very long and dismal winter evenings!
As a result, their discipline can waver and it can lead to dismal returns.
No flight has been that dismal since the rule was put in place, the DOT said.
